Home › 📘 DevOps Interview Handbook — Complete Question...

📘 DevOps Interview Handbook — Complete Question Bank

Scope: 47 real interview questions across 7 domains · Each question answered with 16 sections including production examples, troubleshooting, Mermaid diagrams, hands-on labs, and company-specific variations.
Target: Candidates with 2–10+ years of DevOps/SRE experience preparing for technical interviews at top-tier companies.

🗂️ Table of Contents

Part Domain Questions
Part 1 GitLab CI/CD 13
Part 2 Terraform 5
Part 3 Docker 7
Part 4 Kubernetes 7
Part 5 AWS 5
Part 6 Monitoring & Ticketing 5
Part 7 Shell Scripting & Linux 5
Part 8 OpenShift 9

📖 How to Use This Handbook

Each question follows this exact structure:

  1. Question — Exact wording
  2. Interview Expectation — What the interviewer is looking for
  3. Detailed Answer — Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced
  4. Real Production Example — Actual scenario with context
  5. Step-by-Step Troubleshooting — Numbered steps
  6. Commands Used — Full code blocks
  7. Architecture Diagram — Mermaid diagram
  8. Common Mistakes — What to avoid
  9. Best Practices — What to do
  10. Security Considerations — Security angle
  11. Performance Optimization — Speed/efficiency
  12. Follow-up Questions — 5–10 follow-ups
  13. Hands-on Practice Lab — Step-by-step exercise
  14. Interview Tips — How to answer well
  15. Company-specific Variations — IBM, Amazon, Google, Microsoft, etc.
  16. References — Official documentation links
